capabilities.postcondition: Selected Browser metadata identified Codex In-app Browser / iab.
A fresh IAB tab loaded the fixture target and was closed.
Fixture heading and ready marker each resolved uniquely and visibly.
Rendered form JSON exactly matched name, enabled flag, and blue color.
Counter=2, double-click=1, keyboard value=shortcut-ok.
Frame status changed to clicked.
Target marker observed; back, forward, and reload restored fixture ready state.
New-tab target popup was claimed and its navigation marker observed.
All three screenshots produced non-empty image buffers; Bottom marker was observed.
No active dialog was exposed after bounded attempts.
capabilities.warning: IAB did not provide a reliable dialog postcondition in this run; no automation/user race occurred.

capabilities.postcondition: Bounded fixture console record observed.
Same-origin fixture download event observed.
Synthetic marker round-tripped and was cleared.
Visibility changed true then false.
Override/reset calls completed but effective dimensions differed from requested 800x600.
Expected /asset.svg was inventoried and bundled.
Page.getLayoutMetrics succeeded and filtered event cursor was read.
capabilities.warning: No fixture-generated filtered event was obtained in the bounded read.

capabilities.postcondition: DOM-CUA input became dom-cua-ok; click and double-click page statuses changed.
Coordinate click target reported coordinate-clicked.
Drag began, but no completed drag marker was observed.
capabilities.warning: Returned drag call alone is not treated as a pass.

capabilities.postcondition: Unique checkbox state and type were verified.
Closed tab became unusable; a fresh tab from the same IAB binding restored ready.

capabilities.browser_call: bounded rollout and Gateway log metadata
capabilities.postcondition: Current rollout and same-window Gateway request records were identified.
capabilities.warning: Gateway lacks a GUI session id; correlation is ambiguous.

capabilities.postcondition: Viewport reset, all test tabs finalized, and the exact fixture server process stopped.

observations: Gateway listener was present on 127.0.0.1:8765; bounded same-window trace records identified OpenAI Responses passthrough traffic.
Gateway trace has no GUI session identifier, so correlation is time/provider/model/order based and ambiguous.

rollout_observations: IAB Browser calls executed on fixture URL; no prohibited browser surface was selected.
warning: All capability groups were recorded. Explicit IAB limitations are retained as partial results.
